text:
BOTTOM LINE — Risk-on, small caps led, oil crashed, breadth improving. Small caps outperformed amid housing/industrials strength, oil -7.79% dragged energy while silver +3.35% signaled safe-haven flows, VIX 17.5 below 20d MA 23.4 showed complacency despite Q1 AI/geopolitical scars.

INDICES — VIX 17.5 down from 52wk high 33.8. IWM +2.16%, DIA +1.81%, QQQ +1.31%, SPY +1.21%. Small > large by 0.85pp. SLV +3.35% most notable cross-asset.

VOLUME — Elevated: DIA 1.6x, IWM 1.1x, XLE 1.6x, XLY 1.0x (XLE vol up + price down = energy distribution). Declining: IJR 0.7x, IJH 0.5x, XLC 0.5x (low-conviction ignores). Accumulation in small caps DIA/IWM.

SECTORS — XLY Discretionary +2.36%, XLI Industrials +1.87%, XLK Technology +1.53%, XLRE Real Estate +1.53%, XLV Healthcare +1.49%, XLP Staples +1.26%, XLF Financials +0.77%, XLB Materials +0.25%, XLC Comms +0.23%, XLU Utilities -0.41%, XLE Energy -2.76%. Top industries WGMI +5.35%, JETS +4.84%; bottom XOP -4.84%, USO -7.79%.

THE 7s — Housing +3.50% (DHI strongest, strongest DHI), Old Metals +2.84% (strongest ticker unnamed), Industrial +2.67%, Buildout +2.58%, Fab +2.36%. Energy -2.80% (weakest XLE-related, weakest unnamed), New Metals -0.91%, Power -0.78%, Defense -0.30%, New Staples -0.22%.

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Apr 29, CME hold 100%. Stance: Hawk 6 (Cook,Hammack,Kashkari,Logan,Barkin,Goolsbee), Neutral 5 (Powell,Williams,Barr,Jefferson,Paulson), Dove 4 (Bowman,Miran,Waller,Daly).

POSITIONING — SPY PCR_vol 1.07 elevated protection, QQQ 2.54 very high fear; skews +7.4%/+7.6% put premium. SPY spot near GEX_flip 699. VIX 17.5 below 20d MA 23.4 complacency, MOVE 65.7 below MA 87.6 low bond stress.

CROSS-ASSET — Oil USO -7.79% dragging XLE -2.76% and XOP -4.84% via energy distribution. Silver SLV +3.35% decoupled from flat UUP -0.04%, safe-haven bid amid greed.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 62.1 Greed. Top movers SLV +3.35% cross-asset, WGMI +5.35% industry, JETS +4.84% industry. 20d momentum: Old Metals +18.50% best sector/basket, Energy -6.71% worst. Vol spikes NFLX 3.2x -9.72% New Staples distribution.

WATCH — NFLX -9.72% vol 3.2x distribution risk. SLV +3.35% 20d +12.10% momentum break. DHI +3.50% Housing lead, Q2 EPS Apr 21.
